{{Quote|Maw Installation, this is General Antillies, Commander of the New Republic occupation fleet. Please respond to discuss terms of your surrender.|Wedge Antillies|<ref name="CotF" />}}
The '''Battle of the Maw''' in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]] was between the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala|Daala's]] remaining [[Maw fleet|forces]] including [[Gender/Legends|her]] flagship ''[[Gorgon]]'' and [[Tol Sivron]]'s [[Death Star prototype]].

==Battle==
===Buildup===
{{Quote|Excuse me. Chewbacca respectfully wishes to request that the New Republic Council consider an expedition to Maw Installation, both as a rescue party and as an occupation force for the installation.|C-3PO|<ref name="Apprentice">[[Dark Apprentice (novel)|''Dark Apprentice'']]</ref>}}
Prior to this, the long dead [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]] had been defeated for all time and his grip on [[Kyp Durron]] ended. Earlier, under the influence of the Sith Lord, Kyp had destroyed the [[Cauldron Nebula/Legends|Cauldron Nebula]] and [[Carida/Legends|Carida]]. With the vile spirit destroyed, Kyp came back to his senses and surrendered to [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. At the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] decided that the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] should decide the punishment for Kyp Durron. Skywalker decided that the [[Sun Crusher]] had to be destroyed and that Kyp Durron would do it to pay back for the carnage he had caused. Together, they would go to [[Maw Cluster/Legends|the Maw]] Cluster and plunge the superweapon into the galaxy's [[Black hole/Legends|black holes]] where it would be destroyed for all time.<ref name="CotF" />

Meanwhile, with Daala's forces driven from the [[Maw Installation]], the New Republic sent a force to occupy it. Accompanying the task force were the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]—who wanted to free the remaining Wookiee slaves at the installation—and the former Imperial [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] [[Qwi Xux]]. However, she would never regain her lost memories. The New Republic task force traveled through the dangerous black hole cluster and eventually reached the Maw Installation.<ref name="CotF" />

===Battle===
{{Quote|Rebel troops have entered the base! Rebel troops have entered the—|An unidentified stormtrooper over an intercom|<ref name="CotF" />}}
On its arrival, the fleet captured the Maw Installation with minimal resistance. The Installation's staff managed to destroy one of the New Republic's corvettes with a prototype [[Metal-Crystal Phase Shifter]], but the fleet quickly opened fire on and destroyed the section of the installation housing the MCPS, rendering the remainder of the installation defenseless. The [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] administrator [[Tol Sivron]] took the [[Death Star prototype]] and escaped into space with a majority of the Installation's personnel.<ref name="CotF" />

Upon capturing the Installation, the New Republic troops confiscated documents and unfinished works that had been under development by the scientists at the Installation for use by the New Republic. Though Qwi Xux could not recall any details during her visit, she discovered the true colors of the Empire that she had served and realized that they had misled her. Shortly after, they were interrupted by the arrival of Daala's flagship ''[[Gorgon]]''—the sole remaining [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] in her guardian fleet. The other, [[Basilisk (Star Destroyer)|''Basilisk'']], was destroyed when Kyp Durron obliterated the [[Cauldron Nebula/Legends|Cauldron Nebula]] with the [[Sun Crusher]] in an attempt to destroy Daala and her fleet.<ref name="CotF" />

Upon seeing the New Republic stripping away the weapons discoveries in the Maw Installation, Daala was furious as [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Tarkin]] had assigned the protection of the station to her. With her remaining Star Destroyer, Daala assaulted the New Republic forces as they scrambled to defend themselves. Meanwhile, Tol Sivron took the Death Star Prototype out of the Maw Cluster to the nearby [[Kessel system/Legends|Kessel system]] and used the superweapon's super laser to destroy [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel's]] [[Garrison Moon]]. However, upon receiving [[Battle of Kessel (11 ABY)|coordinated resistance]] from [[Smugglers' Alliance]] vessels, Sivron retreated back into the Maw since the prototype had no [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighter]] escorts and strategic defenses.<ref name="CotF" />

Unaware of the chaos, Skywalker and Durron arrived at the Maw Cluster on their mission to destroy the Sun Crusher. Upon arriving, they saw the scrambled New Republic forces and an asteroid field which had formerly been Kessel's Garrison Moon. Racing towards the Maw Installation, the Jedi watched as the skeletal Death Star appeared in space to join Daala's Star Destroyer. Unknown to Sivron, [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] had managed to hide the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] within the tangled superstructure of the Prototype as it retreated from Kessel. Along with [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]], Solo worked to sabotage the prototype's main reactor before Sivron could fire on the Maw Installation. The ''Falcon'' retreated from the Prototype as Sivron's teams worked desperately to repair the damage done to the reactor. Once the damage was fixed, Sivron order the station to open fire on an idle [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]], completely destroying it.<ref name="CotF" />

Meanwhile, Kyp Durron, wanting to make up for the suffering and deaths he had caused, raced back to the Sun Crusher, using it to engage the prototype while Chewbacca led an attack on Daala's Star Destroyer. As the New Republic force evacuated the Maw Installation, Daala opened fire on the installation's main power reactor which exploded in a large flash, apparently destroying ''Gorgon''. However, in reality, the explosion blinded the sensors and Daala escaped to the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]] to join the remnants of the Empire.<ref name="CotF" />

Piloting the Sun Crusher, Kyp fired his two remaining [[resonance torpedo]]es into the Death Star, but was dismayed to find that the damage they caused was insufficient to destroy or even disable the battle station. Kyp then led the prototype on a chase through the dangerous black holes of the Maw Cluster. In a final gambit, the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] lured the prototype too close to a black hole. As the prototype reached the point of no return, Sivron managed to score a direct [[Superlaser/Legends|superlaser]] hit on the Sun Crusher, overwhelming its armor and causing it to lose engine power. As both the Sun Crusher and the prototype Death Star descended into the bottomless pit of the [[Black hole/Legends|black hole]], a small message pod was launched from the Sun Crusher. When the pod was recovered by Han Solo, he was astonished to find that Durron had managed to cram himself into the pod, breaking many of his of bones in the process. Kyp's survival was due to his innate ability to use a [[Force power/Legends|Jedi technique]] almost to the point of [[Morichro/Legends|suspended animation]]. Kyp recovered from his wounds and served as a Jedi Knight for the New Republic.<ref name="CotF" />
